# Copilot Instructions

## Icons

- Always prefer colored icons over monochrome icons for skill and technology badges.
- Prefer official brand assets or colored vendor icons before falling back to Simple Icons.
- Keep icons local to the repo whenever possible; avoid external runtime icon URLs.
- If only a monochrome icon is available, tint or replace it before considering the task complete.
- When adding a new skill icon, update both the local asset set and the mapping in `src/app/shared/skill-icons.ts`.
